personal.name: Md Abidur Rahman
personal.title: AI Powered Full Stack Developer
personal.subtitle: Engineering Pixels Into Seamless Experiences
personal.bio: Hi, I'm Abidur Rahman, a Full Stack Engineer passionate about building modern web applications, immersive user experiences, and scalable software solutions. Currently contributing at Tech Innovators Ltd, where I transform business requirements into premium digital experiences using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern full-stack technologies.

experience.description: Assist senior engineers in designing, reviewing, and inspecting fire suppression, detection, and life safety systems for industrial facilities, while ensuring compliance with local and international fire codes and contributing to risk assessments and site surveys.

Conducts independent, impartial on-site fire safety audits at industrial facilities to assess compliance with national and international fire codes, identify hazards, and evaluate the effectiveness of fire protection systems, emergency plans, and risk mitigation strategies.

projects.title: HERO.IO - App Discovery Platform
projects.description: A modern, responsive web application for discovering and managing mobile applications. Built with React, featuring beautiful UI components and seamless user experience.

projects.title: WarmPaws – Pet Care in Winter
projects.description: WarmPaws is a cozy winter companion platform designed for pet owners to ensure their furry friends stay warm, safe, and healthy during the cold season. This React-based single-page application (SPA) allows users to explore local pet care services, winter pet clothing, grooming options, and expert tips — all in one friendly, modern interface.

projects.title: InteractionDashboard API - Issue Tracking System
projects.description: InteractionDashboard API is a robust RESTful API backend system designed for issue tracking and management. Built with Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, it provides a secure and scalable solution for managing software development issues, feature requests, and bug tracking with role-based access control.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Apps
services.description: Building production-ready applications tailored for high scalability and clean modular architecture.

services.title: Performance Optimization
services.description: Fine-tuning Core Web Vitals, SSR, and caching strategies for instantaneous load speeds.

services.title: Immersive 3D/XR Web
services.description: Creating breathtaking spatial experiences using Three.js with optimized draw calls.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Configuring secure cloud environments, SSL certificates, and CI/CD pipelines.
